contextBlurb: Louisiana has 12 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 3 relate to moratoriums or prohibitions.

legislation.title: Provides relative to permitting and reporting of water usage at data centers
legislation.summary: Provides relative to permitting and reporting of water usage at data centers

legislation.title: Establishes requirements for health insurance issuers using artificial intelligence or automated decision systems. (8/1/26)
legislation.summary: Establishes requirements for health insurance issuers using artificial intelligence or automated decision systems. (8/1/26)

legislation.title: Prohibits the use of deepfake material against students enrolled in K-12. (8/1/26)
legislation.summary: Prohibits the use of deepfake material against students enrolled in K-12. (8/1/26)

legislation.title: Provides relative to increases for certain utility rates
legislation.summary: Provides relative to increases for certain utility rates

legislation.title: Provides for lead hazard risk assessments for certain child care facilities and prekindergarten programs. (8/1/26) (RE INCREASE SG EX See Note)
legislation.summary: Provides for lead hazard risk assessments for certain child care facilities and prekindergarten programs. (8/1/26) (RE INCREASE SG EX See Note)

legislation.title: Provides for the establishment of the Louisiana Center for Safe Schools within the Louisiana Commission on Law Enforcement and Administration of Criminal Justice (EG +$250,000 GF EX See Note)
legislation.summary: Provides for the establishment of the Louisiana Center for Safe Schools within the Louisiana Commission on Law Enforcement and Administration of Criminal Justice (EG +$250,000 GF EX See Note)

legislation.title: Provides relative to information sharing for the purposes of Louisiana's Foundational Integrated Research System for Transformation (LA FIRST)
legislation.summary: Provides relative to information sharing for the purposes of Louisiana's Foundational Integrated Research System for Transformation (LA FIRST)

legislation.title: Creates a consumer bill of rights regarding artificial intelligence
legislation.summary: Creates a consumer bill of rights regarding artificial intelligence

legislation.title: Provides relative to unlawful conduct involving images of another person created by artificial intelligence (RE SEE FISC NOTE GF EX)
legislation.summary: Provides relative to unlawful conduct involving images of another person created by artificial intelligence (RE SEE FISC NOTE GF EX)

legislation.title: Requires disclosure of the use of artificial intelligence in telephone campaign communications
legislation.summary: Requires disclosure of the use of artificial intelligence in telephone campaign communications

legislation.title: Prohibits public contracts with entities owned or controlled by foreign adversaries for the provision of artificial intelligence technology
legislation.summary: Prohibits public contracts with entities owned or controlled by foreign adversaries for the provision of artificial intelligence technology

legislation.title: Prohibits using artificial intelligence to create child sexual abuse materials. (8/1/26)
legislation.summary: Prohibits using artificial intelligence to create child sexual abuse materials. (8/1/26)
